details.test: Task 1: Build Day 1 morning schedule with Design and Engineering sessions
Task 2: Register for cheapest beginner UX research workshop on Day 2
Task 3: Bookmark a highly rated Day 1 keynote with 15-minute reminder

Task 5: Favorite the first three Gold Developer Tools sponsors
Task 6: Add a speaker's longest session to My Schedule (using Jordan Lee)
Task 7: Submit support request about vegan and gluten-free lunch options
Task 8: Subscribe to daily recap emails with AI and Product Management topics
Task 9: Resolve schedule conflict by removing one session and adding an online session with capacity
